title: EPC Industrie is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: EPC Industrie is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
